---
name: Request a website repair
about: Propose a public, domain-scoped usability or accessibility repair
title: "[Repair request] "
labels: "repair-request,needs-triage"
assignees: ""
---

<!-- Start at https://patch-the-web.vercel.app/authors/ to generate a privacy-safe request. -->
<!-- patch-the-web-request:v1 -->

## Public page

Paste one public URL without a query string or fragment.

## Problem

Describe the concrete usability problem. Do not include field values, account data, application answers, payment information, credentials, or private links.

## Desired outcomes

- Describe one observable result.

## Privacy confirmation

- [ ] I reviewed this public issue and removed personal, account, application, payment, and authentication information.
- [ ] I understand that publication requires policy validation, automated tests, live compatibility evidence, and human review.

## Track this request

After creating the issue, follow its review status at https://patch-the-web.vercel.app/requests/.
